summary: Admin Popup Message Feature Testing Complete - All tests passed. Backend: 17/17 pytest tests passed. Frontend: 7/7 Playwright tests passed. Feature allows admin to create, edit, toggle, and delete popup messages that display to logged-in users.
action_items: Admin credentials (admin@paras.com / 123456) appear to be incorrect - PIN was rejected. This prevents testing the Admin Popup Messages UI page directly. Consider updating documentation or resetting admin credentials.
seed_data_creation: Test popups created and cleaned up during pytest runs. One active popup exists (popup_1772704719) with DMT announcement.
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Admin Popup Messages Feature Testing Complete - Iteration 103:

## Backend API Tests (17 passed):
- GET /api/admin/popup/all - Returns all popup messages
- GET /api/admin/popup/active - Returns active popup for users
- POST /api/admin/popup/create - Creates new popup message (validates required fields)
- PUT /api/admin/popup/update/{id} - Updates popup message (handles 404)
- PATCH /api/admin/popup/toggle/{id} - Toggles popup enabled/disabled (handles 404)
- DELETE /api/admin/popup/delete/{id} - Deletes popup message (handles 404)
- Only one popup can be active at a time (tested with delay for unique IDs)
- All message types tested: info, success, warning, error
- Button link functionality verified

## Frontend Tests (7 passed):
- API integration tests for popup endpoints
- Popup does NOT show on login page (/login)
- Popup shows after user login on dashboard (when active popup exists)
- Popup close button (X) dismisses popup
- Popup action button works and closes popup
- Session storage prevents popup from showing again after close

## Test Files:
- Backend: /app/backend/tests/test_admin_popup.py (17 tests)
- Frontend: /app/tests/e2e/admin-popup-messages.spec.ts (7 tests)

## Known Issues:
- Admin credentials (admin@paras.com / 123456) rejected with 'Wrong PIN' error. Could not test Admin Panel UI at /admin/popup-messages directly.

## Active Popup:
- popup_1772704719: 'Welcome to Paras Reward!' - DMT Bank Transfer announcement
